_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of ModelRegistry + models surface at SHA 734e08e.

model_thinking_level_map_semantics._doc: If model.thinkingLevelMap[level] === null, that level is NOT supported. If level === 'xhigh' and mapped === undefined, NOT supported. Otherwise supported.
model_thinking_level_map_semantics.clampThinkingLevel: Find requested level in EXTENDED_THINKING_LEVELS; if directly supported, return. Otherwise scan forward then backward for first supported level. Fallback to 'off'.

calculate_cost_formula._doc: Pi divides cost.input/output/cacheRead/cacheWrite by 1,000,000 then multiplies by usage tokens. Total is sum of 4 layers.
calculate_cost_formula.formula: cost.X = (model.cost.X / 1000000) * usage.X for X in [input, output, cacheRead, cacheWrite]; cost.total = sum

public_methods_model_access: getAvailable() -> Model[]  // filters to models with configured auth
public_methods_lifecycle: refresh() -> void  // reload from disk + rebuild dynamic OAuth/API registrations

provider_config_input_shape._doc: Schema for models.json provider override + OAuth registration

fields.apiKey: string (optional, literal or env-var ref via resolveConfigValue)

loading_pipeline: loadCustomModels(path) — parses models.json with TypeBox validation; strips comments/trailing commas
loadBuiltInModels(overrides) — calls getProviders() + getModels(provider) from ai/models.ts
mergeCustomModels() — custom wins on (provider, id) conflicts
OAuth modifyModels — per OAuth provider, transforms final model list

rpc_command_wiring.set_model: find(provider, modelId) -> update harness current_model; emit response
rpc_command_wiring.cycle_model: rotate to next in getAvailable(); emit response with new model + thinkingLevel + isScoped
rpc_command_wiring.get_commands: Sprint 6f₂ — extension/skill/template aggregation (DEFERRED from 6f₁ — needs extension surface)

deferred_in_sprint_6f._doc: Sprint 6f₁ ships ModelRegistry RUNTIME with seed catalog. Full catalog + models.json + model-resolver in Sprint 6f₂.
items: Full models.generated.ts catalog (428KB → models_generated.json data transfer)
models.json schema validation (TypeBox port → Aelix uses dataclass + pydantic or hand-rolled validation)
model-resolver.ts (~530 LOC — partial-id matching + provider auto-detect)
16 remaining RPC commands (steer/follow_up/cycle_thinking_level/queue modes/session tree/extension UI/etc.)

cycle_model.data: {model: Model<any>, thinkingLevel: ThinkingLevel, isScoped: bool} | null

model_fields_missing_for_pi_parity: compat (provider-specific compat overrides — already in OpenAICompletionsCompat per Sprint 6b)

aelix_seed_catalog_plan._doc: Sprint 6f₁ seeds a minimal catalog. Sprint 6f₂ ports full models.generated.json.
